name: kee-sterling-finance
description: An eve agent that monitors revenue and flags churn / failed-payment risk. One root agent, one tool (assess_account), one required Stripe connection.

scripts.bundle: rm -f sterling-finance.zip && zip -r -q sterling-finance.zip agent entry.json agent.toml package.json tsconfig.json eslint.config.mjs README.md .nvmrc -x '*/.DS_Store' && echo 'wrote sterling-finance.zip' && unzip -l sterling-finance.zip
